subcodes.title: Answer to questions, Dublin, 1912-08-08
subcodes.first_line: All realities and spirits are immortal, even the spirits of non-believers and imperfect persons.
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع حقایق و ارواح باقیست حتی ارواح غیر مومنین و نفوس ناقصه اما نسبت بارواح
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @spiritual transformation, @existence; immortality of the human soul
